name: Doom
description: Hehm ehme meh heh heh, speak of me, and I shall appear. Face me and face the furnace!

abilities.name: Lvl Pain
abilities.description: Doom's attacks curse enemy heroes. After 2.5s, the cursed heroe bursts with a pillar of fire, damaging itself and all units in a 66 Ao E for 10% of the damage taken from Doom during the curse.

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.description: Devour is now a charged-based ability with a restore time corresponding to the the ability's current cooldown. Enables ancient creeps targeting.

abilities.name: Scorched Earth
abilities.description: Carpets the nearby earth in flames which damage enemies, while also granting Doom increased movement speed.

abilities.name: Infernal Blade
abilities.description: Applies a bash and burns for a base damage plus a percentage of the target's max health as damage per second. Lucifer shares the fire branding bestowed upon him at the time of his exile.

abilities.name: Doom
abilities.description: Inflicts a curse that dispels an enemy hero, prevents them from casting spells or healing in any way, while taking damage over time.
